summary: Iteration 16: CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED - Settings page working day toggles no longer crash with 'Maximum update depth exceeded'. Bug was caused by Radix UI Checkbox component causing infinite re-render loop. Fix replaced Radix Checkbox with plain div visual indicator. All 10 test scenarios passed.
passed_tests: 1. Navigate to /settings page - PASS (page loads without crash)
2. All 7 day toggles visible with correct labels (Lunedì through Domenica) - PASS
3. All day toggles have data-testid='day-toggle-{day}' attribute - PASS
4. Click each day toggle (lunedì→domenica) - PASS (all clicks successful, no crash)
5. Rapid clicking test (5 rapid clicks on Lunedì) - PASS (no 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error)
6. Domenica toggle click - checked→unchecked→checked state changes correctly - PASS
7. Visual check: checked days show gold border + checkmark, unchecked show neutral - PASS
9. Reload persistence: settings state persists after page reload - PASS
10. No JS errors in console during any interactions - PASS
11. Drag-and-drop section reorder at /gestione-sito - PASS (7 sections, drag handles, reset button)
12. Public website loads at / - PASS (hero section with 'Bruno Melito Hair' visible)
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPage.jsx lines 301-335: Correctly replaced Radix Checkbox with plain div visual indicator
toggleDay function (lines 158-168): Clean functional update pattern with setSettings callback
No Radix state management involved - parent div onClick is the sole handler
Checkmark SVG conditionally rendered based on isChecked state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified: Settings page day toggle bug fix confirmed working. The original bug was 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error when clicking working day toggles, caused by Radix UI Checkbox component. Fix replaced Radix Checkbox with plain div + conditional SVG checkmark. Day toggles have data-testid='day-toggle-{lowercase-day}' (with accents: lunedì, martedì, etc.). Save button has data-testid='save-settings-btn'. All toggles work smoothly with no re-render loops.

bug_fix_details.original_bug: Maximum update depth exceeded when clicking working day toggles
bug_fix_details.root_cause: Radix UI Checkbox component caused infinite re-render loop when used as controlled component without proper onCheckedChange
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Replaced Radix Checkbox with plain div visual indicator that renders checkmark SVG when checked
